hero.role: Digital Expert • Content Creator • AI Consultant

expertise.title: Digital World Expert
expertise.subtitle: My competencies stem from working for major players (Decathlon, Wirtualna Polska) and successes in building my own projects.

items.title: Content Creator
items.description: I merge my sports passion with professional video production. My technical skiing videos have reached over 1 million views, building a highly engaged community of 8k+ followers across Instagram and TikTok.

items.title: Data Analytics Excellence
items.description: I implement Enterprise-class solutions (Google Analytics 4, BigQuery). I experienced in large-scale analytics platform migrations (14 CEE markets) and building advanced tracking strategies for web and mobile (Decathlon, WP).

items.title: E-commerce Strategy
items.description: I build sales strategies based on hard data. I managed e-commerce and implemented MarTech solutions that genuinely increase conversion and Customer Lifetime Value (LTV), bridging business and technology perspectives.

ai.title: AI for Business
ai.subtitle: Leverage my analytical experience to implement AI in a measurable and safe way.
ai.description: As a Digital Analytics Business Partner, I know data is the oil of the 21st century, but AI is the engine. I don't implement 'chatbots for fun'. I design processes where AI analyzes your results, automates reporting, and supports growth strategy — just as I did for corporations, but scaled for your business.

contentCreator.title: Content Creator
contentCreator.subtitle: Technical skiing is my passion. I share knowledge, encourage progress, and inspire thousands to hit the slopes.
contentCreator.description: As an instructor and enthusiast, I create engaging and encouraging content helping skiers at every level. My technical skiing videos have reached over 1 million views across platforms, building a community of 8k+ followers.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project requiring digital expertise? Or want to chat about skiing or AI? Write to me.
